texto: All of my most significant moments somehow involved music. It's like my life was a John Hughes film and somebody had to put together the perfect soundtrack.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Caprice Crane: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “All of my most significant moments somehow involved music. It's like my life was a John Hughes fi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, vida, music pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de music.

texto: Dating is like pushing your tray along in a cafeteria. Nothing looks good, but you know you have to pick something by the time you reach the cashier.

texto: Picture the person who intimidates you most. Now picture them crouched like a dog, pooping on the sidewalk, looking up at you, all vulnerable. We all poop. Maybe not on the sidewalk, but nobody is better than you and don't let them think they are for a minute.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Caprice Crane: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Picture the person who intimidates you most. Now picture them crouched like a dog, pooping on the…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, confidence, intimidation pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de intimidation.
